content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/prisma/schema.prisma:1	generator client {2	  provider = "prisma-client-js"3	}4	5	datasource db {6	  provider = "sqlite"7	  url      = "file:./dev.db"8	}9	10	model User {11	  id            String    @id @default(cuid())12	  name          String?13	  email         String?   @unique14	  password      String?15	  role          String    @default("USER")16	  orders        Order[]17	}18	19	model Restaurant {20	  id          String     @id @default(cuid())21	  name        String22	  description String?23	  menuItems   MenuItem[]24	}25	26	model MenuItem {27	  id           String     @id @default(cuid())28	  name         String29	  description  String?30	  price        Float31	  restaurantId String32	  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])33	  orderItems   OrderItem[]34	}35	36	model Order {37	  id         String      @id @default(cuid())38	  userId     String39	  user       User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])40	  status     String      @default("PENDING")41	  total      Float42	  items      OrderItem[]43	  createdAt  DateTime    @default(now())44	}45	46	model OrderItem {47	  id         String   @id @default(cuid())48	  orderId    String49	  order      Order    @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])50	  menuItemId String51	  menuItem   MenuItem @relation(fields: [menuItemId], references: [id])52	  quantity   Int53	}
